series_description: Rough drafts and edited drafts of analyses, minutes, reports, correspondence, evaluations, and other documents.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until superceded ; Paper: Retain until superceded

series_description: Records that depict discussion between staff members in developing or revising internal agency policies or policies relevant to the agency.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain during policy development or revision; destroy when the policy is decided and approved by Director. ; Paper: Retain during policy development or revision; destroy when the policy is decided and approved by Director.
